revision.content:
If you are the last person to leave this room, please take a minute and check the following:

* All soldering irons turned off * All tools returned to their proper places * Workspace you were using is clean * Window blinds closed * All lights turned off * Additionally, we remind you: workbenches are NOT project storage. Put your project up in an appropriate storage area. We thank you for your effort, together we can make Bloominglabs a better place for everyone to use. [[Image:Qrcode_exitprotocol-electronicsroom.png|none|thumb|100px|Link to latest version of this document]] [[Category:Documents]] [[Category:The_Space]] [[Category:Protocols]]
